title: UGP ( Ultimate Greenscreen Pack )
description: Changes blocks to be used for chroma keying or green screen (greenscreen). With many options on wat should be on and off via mods
body:
This pack is made for those who want to take pictures or video their minecraft expereince but want to cut certain parts out easily with software later. Sporting not only Red Green and Blue but also white and black for all the needs u could have. Some blocks are emmisive too making the blocks not change color at all from the enviroment!

## Make sure to check the versions tab for dependencies
